text.title: clean-architecture Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for clean-architecture as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Controllers become stateful and untestable. Every endpoint reimplements the same logic.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Entities become non-portable; changing database or web framework breaks domain tests.
